entry.title: New IDC HSHQDC15D00015 awarded to HP ENTERPRISE SERVICES, LLC for the amount of $150,000

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: DATA PROCESSING, HOSTING, AND RELATED SERVICES

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

NON-CONTRACT ACTION. T0001 CHANGES "ALLOWS DELIVERY ORDER/TASK ORDER" FOR CLIN 0025 TO ASSIST WITH FEMA DATA MIGRATION.

NON-CONTRACT ACTION. NOT REPORTED TO FPDS-NG.
